creator: freebsd@sysctl.cz
text:
Hi,
are you going to update webkit ?
I need higher version webkit and his library

 > PKG_CONFIG_LIBDIR=/usr/home/maxfx/Documents/FreeBSD-Ports/chatgpt/work/.pkgconfig:/usr/local/libdata/pkgconfig:/usr/local/share/pkgconfig:/usr/libdata/pkgconfig PKG_CONFIG_ALLOW_SYSTEM_CFLAGS=1 pkg-config --libs --cflags javascriptcoregtk-4.1 javascriptcoregtk-4.1 >= 2.38
